\tzpentry{ID3627}{Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3627 introduces Spectral Gap Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Delta\phi(t) = \operatorname{wrap}\!\left(\phi(x(t)) - \phi_d(t)\right) \in (-\pi,\pi]. \end{equation}
